message:
Command `# Perfect - step 49 state is clean. Resume from RepairDesignPostGPL (step 50)
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --from OpenROAD.RepairDesignPostGPL \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v3.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane resumed — PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v3.pid
sleep 20
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended early - check log"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_v3.log` executed with exit code 0.

# Perfect - step 49 state is clean. Resume from RepairDesignPostGPL (step 50)
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --from OpenROAD.RepairDesignPostGPL \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v3.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane resumed — PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v3.pid
sleep 20
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended early - check log"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_v3.log
